summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU issues with Morpheus devices(VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: DFU language update stuck at 99% for 8 minutes on Voyager 5200 and Voyager 8200
description_clean:
Three DFU issues with Voyager 5200 and Voyager 8200 (Morpheus devices):

Issue 1: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing. Language updates previously took 1-2 minutes but now take 10 minutes or more.

Issue 2: After a successful device firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the Voyager 5200 headset, instead of showing the device as up to date.

Issue 3: When a phone call is active and a device firmware update is attempted, the DFU process gets stuck at 26%. Expected behavior is that a pop-up should appear saying "Cannot update this device during a call".
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected Voyager 5200 or Voyager 8200 device
Initiate a language update for the connected device
Observe the progress bar during the language update
Wait for the language update to complete
After a successful device firmware update, return to the Home screen
Check the device status for available updates
Initiate a phone call on the connected smartphone
While the call is active, navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings
Attempt to start a device firmware update while the call is ongoing
expected: Issue 1: Language update should complete within 1-2 minutes as it did previously. Issue 2: After a successful firmware update, the device should show as "Up to date" with no available updates. Issue 3: When attempting a DFU during an active call, a pop-up should appear stating "Cannot update this device during a call" and the update should not proceed.
actual: Issue 1: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing, taking 10+ minutes total. Issue 2: After a successful device firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the Voyager 5200 headset instead of showing the device as up to date. Issue 3: When a phone call is active and a device firmware update is attempted, the DFU process gets stuck at 26% with no pop-up or error message.
